title: ZXBrick Visual Walkthrough
description: Take a visual tour of ZXBrick and explore its gameplay, levels, power-ups, and progression.
summary: Explore ZXBrick through screenshots that showcase the gameplay, progression, and features that make every level a new challenge.

images.caption: Get ready to begin your next game.
Start a new game or continue your progress.
Every level introduces a new challenge.
Destroy every brick and chase a new high score.

sections.heading: Take a Tour of ZXBrick
paragraphs: These screenshots introduce the main areas of ZXBrick, helping you become familiar with the game before or during play.
Follow the journey from starting a new game through to mastering levels, collecting power-ups, and improving your score.

featureShowcases.heading: Start Your Adventure
featureShowcases.summary: Every game begins here as you prepare to take on ZXBrick's handcrafted levels.
body: The opening screens introduce ZXBrick and prepare you for the fast-paced arcade action ahead.
From here you'll quickly move into gameplay and begin your journey through all 100 levels.

featureShowcases.heading: Getting Ready to Play
featureShowcases.summary: Access the main menu and prepare for your next game.
body: The main menu is your starting point for every session, making it easy to begin a new game, continue your progress, or explore other features.
Everything you need is only a few taps away.

image.caption: Everything begins from the main menu.

featureShowcases.heading: Master Every Level
featureShowcases.summary: Every level challenges your reactions, timing, and accuracy.
body: As you progress through ZXBrick you'll encounter increasingly difficult layouts that reward practice and precision.
Completing levels helps you unlock achievements, improve your score, and climb the leaderboards.

image.caption: Every level is another opportunity to improve.

featureShowcases.heading: Power Through the Challenge
featureShowcases.summary: Use power-ups and skill to overcome increasingly difficult levels.
body: Power-ups provide valuable advantages during gameplay, helping you survive difficult situations and score more points.
Combined with good paddle control and fast reactions, they become an important part of mastering ZXBrick.

image.caption: Power-ups and skill help you reach new high scores.
